title: clerodendrum phlomidis f. rubrum
intro: Clerodendrum phlomidis f. rubrum is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Clerodendrum phlomidis plant, a type of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and it is also believed to have antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum phlomidis f. rubrum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, among other uses. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
